Container.Name: epicgames-claimer
Container.Overview: Automatically claims free Epic Games games every Thursday. Provides a web dashboard to view claim history and submit 2FA codes when prompted.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Epic Claimer dashboard.

Config.Name: Config Storage
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database (claim history and settings).

Config.Name: Epic Email
Config.Description: Your Epic Games account email address. Can also be set via the dashboard at port 3000.

Config.Name: Epic Password
Config.Description: Your Epic Games account password. Can also be set via the dashboard at port 3000.

Config.Name: Notification Type
Config.Description: Push notification service: ntfy, gotify, or pushover. Leave blank to disable notifications.

Config.Name: Notification URL / Token
Config.Description: For ntfy: full topic URL. For gotify: server URL. For pushover: apptoken|userkey

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for the scheduler. Epic games drop Thursday 11 AM ET.

Config.Name: Epic OAuth Client ID
Config.Description: Epic Games OAuth client ID. Only change if login fails with 'invalid client credentials'. See github.com/Tectors/EpicGamesAPIDocs for current values.

Config.Name: Epic OAuth Client Secret
Config.Description: Epic Games OAuth client secret. Only change if login fails with 'invalid client credentials'.
